docs.title: Campus Study Buddy
docs.text:
Welcome to the internal documentation for Campus Study Buddy.

This wiki covers: - What the app does and how it’s organized - Frontend (React + TypeScript) - Backend (Node.js + Express + TypeScript) - Architecture and design decisions - Infrastructure (GitHub Actions, Pages; Azure services) - Design system and accessibility - Operations & runbooks

Repo: https://github.com/GimbiyaSa/campus_study_buddy

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
• SPA (React) served by Vite dev server locally
  • Node/Express API
  • Azure services for data and realtime
  • Docs hosted on GitHub Pages (MkDocs Material)

docs.title: Build & Release
docs.text:
• GitHub Actions build docs → Pages
  • App CI/CD to be defined (frontend/backend)

docs.title: Backend Overview
docs.text:
• Runtime: Node.js
  • Framework: Express
  • Language: TypeScript
  • Endpoints: health check, users CRUD (sample)

docs.title: Dev
docs.text: ```bash cd backend npm i npm run dev

docs.title: API
docs.text:
Method Path Description GET /api/health Health check GET /api/users List users GET /api/users/:id Get user POST /api/users Create user (demo)

Update when endpoints grow beyond the demo set.

docs.title: User (example)
docs.text: ```ts type User = { id: string; name: string; email: string; createdAt: string; };

docs.title: Services
docs.text:
• Cosmos DB: primary data store (users, notes, courses)
  • Web PubSub: real-time events (chat, live updates)
  • Service Bus: async workflows / background jobs

Add service wrappers (repository pattern) and centralize config.

docs.title: Design System
docs.text:
• Clean, friendly dashboard style
  • Cards with soft shadows, rounded corners
  • Brand palette: greens/teals

docs.title: Accessibility
docs.text:
• Keyboard accessible nav & menus
  • Focus rings on interactive elements
  • Color contrast ≥ WCAG AA where possible

docs.title: Tokens (starter)
docs.text:
• Color: brand-50/100/500/700
  • Radius: sm, md, xl, 2xl
  • Shadow: soft/card
  • Spacing: 4/6/8/12/16 px scale

docs.title: Frontend Overview
docs.text:
• Framework: React + TypeScript
  • Build: Vite
  • Styling: Tailwind + custom components
  • Icons: lucide-react
  • HTTP: Axios (services/api.ts)

docs.title: Local dev
docs.text: ```bash cd frontend npm i npm run dev

docs.title: Components
docs.text:
• Sidebar / Header: responsive; keyboard-accessible dropdown
  • Cards: course items, quick actions chips, donut progress
  • CalendarWidget: inline calendar + “Upcoming Sessions”

docs.title: Conventions
docs.text:
• Keep components small
  • Lift state where it’s shared
  • Co-locate styles; prefer Tailwind utilities

docs.title: Pages & Layout
docs.text:
Main areas: - Dashboard: header with dropdown, cards (study buddies, activity, calendar) - Courses: course list with progress & actions - Partners: find/connect study partners - Settings

Layout uses a sidebar and responsive top bar on mobile.

docs.title: State Management
docs.text:
• Local React state for UI bits (dropdowns, active tab)
  • Service layer in services/api.ts for server calls (Axios)
  • Future:
  • React Query for server cache
  • Context for user/session

docs.title: Docs
docs.text: • Workflow builds MkDocs & deploys to GitHub Pages.

docs.title: App (future)
docs.text: • Lint/test → build → deploy to hosting (e.g., Azure Web Apps)

docs.title: Environments
docs.text:
• Local: frontend (5173), backend (5000)
  • Cloud: Azure services (Cosmos DB, Web PubSub, Service Bus)
  • Secrets: use repo/environment secrets; do not commit keys

docs.title: Operations
docs.text:
• How to run locally
  • How to check logs and health
  • Where to file issues

docs.title: API down
docs.text:
1. Check backend logs
  2. Verify env vars and port 5000
  3. Restart process

docs.title: Frontend build fails
docs.text:
1. npm ci
  2. npm run build
  3. Check Vite/Tailwind config

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
• CORS: ensure backend is running before frontend. Verify REACT_APP_API_URL.
  • Port in use: free port 5000/5173.
  • Type errors: npm run build in backend; fix TS errors reported.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Campus Study Buddy helps students organize learning, track progress, and connect with study partners.

docs.title: High-level features
docs.text:
• Dashboard with study buddy suggestions, activity, schedule
  • Courses list + progress
  • Notes & reminders (UI scaffolding)
  • Study sessions / calendar

docs.title: Tech stack
docs.text:
• Frontend: React 18, TypeScript
  • Backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript
  • Infra/Services: GitHub Actions/Pages, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Web PubSub, Azure Service Bus

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text:
• Connect real API for lessons, study buddies, notes
  • Auth (Azure AD B2C or equivalent)
  • Persist reminders/notes to DB
  • Real-time messaging via Web PubSub
  • Tests (unit + e2e)
